query: Find jazzkoncerter i København i denne uge
criteria: Response should use the KultuNaut event calendar endpoint GET https://www.kultunaut.dk/perl/arrlist/type-nynaut with Genre=Jazz and an Area parameter for Copenhagen (e.g., Area=Region Hovedstaden or a Copenhagen postal code), plus a periode parameter (e.g., periode=7 or similar). Should mention that results are returned as HTML and list event titles, dates, venues.

query: What events are happening in Aarhus today?
criteria: Response should call GET https://www.kultunaut.dk/perl/arrlist/type-nynaut with Area=8000+Aarhus+C (or similar Aarhus area parameter) and periode=1 (today). Should extract event titles/times/venues from the returned HTML.

query: Hent detaljer om arrangement med ArrNr 19896575
criteria: Response should use the event detail endpoint GET https://www.kultunaut.dk/perl/arrmore/type-nynaut?ArrNr=19896575 and return structured metadata such as title, date/time, venue, genre, description, and organizer.

query: Show me what films are playing in Danish cinemas this week
criteria: Response should use the cinema films endpoint GET https://www.kultunaut.dk/perl/searchlist/type-nynaut?periode=1&Genre=Film&Area= (optionally with an Area filter). Should return a list of films/screenings parsed from the HTML response.

query: give me the most popular cultural events in Denmark right now
criteria: Response should use the event calendar endpoint GET https://www.kultunaut.dk/perl/arrlist/type-nynaut with Order=Rating to sort by popularity, optionally combined with Area=Hele+Danmark. Alternatively could use the RSS feed at /perl/mini/type-rss?Order=Rating. Should return event names sorted by rating.

query: I want to embed a Danish cultural events calendar on my website
criteria: Response should reference the KultuNaut widget endpoint GET https://www.kultunaut.dk/perl/widget/type-nynaut and explain it is an embeddable widget for external sites.

query: Hvilke gratis arrangementer kan jeg deltage i?
criteria: Response should reference the free events endpoint /perl/view/type-nynaut/gratiskalender (full URL https://www.kultunaut.dk/perl/view/type-nynaut/gratiskalender) and mention that this is the 'gratiskalender' for free events on KultuNaut.

query: Find aftenskolekurser på kultunaut
criteria: Response should use the adult school courses endpoint /perl/view/type-nynaut/aftenskole (https://www.kultunaut.dk/perl/view/type-nynaut/aftenskole) for adult education courses on KultuNaut.

query: Get me the RSS feed of upcoming events sorted by popularity
criteria: Response should use the RSS endpoint GET https://www.kultunaut.dk/perl/mini/type-rss?Order=Rating with a periode parameter. Should mention this returns an RSS feed.

query: Are there any rock or pop concerts in Aarhus today?
criteria: Response should call GET https://www.kultunaut.dk/perl/arrlist/type-nynaut with Area=8000+Aarhus+C, periode=1, and Genre=Rock/Pop. Should list matching concerts from the HTML results.

query: Show me theater plays (skuespil) coming up in the next month in the Capital Region
criteria: Response should use GET https://www.kultunaut.dk/perl/arrlist/type-nynaut with Genre=Skuespil, Area=Region+Hovedstaden, and periode=30 (upcoming month). Should return theater event listings.

query: Can I get the English version of KultuNaut's event listings?
criteria: Response should reference URL structure with the 'UK' language code, e.g., https://www.kultunaut.dk/perl/arrlist/type-nynaut/UK/ or /type-nynaut/UK/, and explain that no language code = Danish, S=Swedish, UK=English, D=German.

query: find udstillinger i denne måned
criteria: Response should use GET https://www.kultunaut.dk/perl/arrlist/type-nynaut with Genre=Udstilling and periode=30 (upcoming month). Should return a list of exhibitions parsed from HTML.

query: I want to log in to bookmark events on KultuNaut
criteria: Response should reference login endpoint /perl/openlogin/type-nynaut and the bookmarks endpoint /perl/profile/type-nynaut/myratings, noting that bookmarking requires login.

query: list special themed calendars on the site
criteria: Response should reference the special calendars endpoint /perl/view/type-nynaut/specialkalendere (https://www.kultunaut.dk/perl/view/type-nynaut/specialkalendere).

query: Find familievenlige film der vises lige nu
criteria: Response should use the event calendar or cinema endpoint with Genre=Familiefilm (e.g., GET https://www.kultunaut.dk/perl/arrlist/type-nynaut?Genre=Familiefilm&periode=1) to find family films currently showing.

query: Are there any workshops or chess events I can attend?
criteria: Response should use GET https://www.kultunaut.dk/perl/arrlist/type-nynaut with Genre=Workshop for workshops, and mention the MarkType filter for niche categories such as chess (skak), circus, cycling, scouts, dogs, etc.

query: kan du give mig kulturarrangementer på svensk?
criteria: Response should reference the Swedish language code 'S' in the URL structure, e.g., https://www.kultunaut.dk/perl/arrlist/type-nynaut/S/ or /type-nynaut/S/, and explain that S=Swedish.

query: What's a quick way to fetch Denmark-wide cultural events without scraping a browser?
criteria: Response should emphasize that KultuNaut endpoints are GET-based Perl CGI returning HTML (no auth required for read), and recommend using the calendar endpoint GET https://www.kultunaut.dk/perl/arrlist/type-nynaut with Area=Hele+Danmark, rather than browser automation. May also mention the RSS feed alternative.

query: I need event details including venue and organizer for a specific arrangement number 12345678
criteria: Response should use GET https://www.kultunaut.dk/perl/arrmore/type-nynaut?ArrNr=12345678 and explain that the returned HTML contains structured metadata including title, date/time, venue, genre, description, and organizer.
